channel.title: Hongwei Li(李洪伟)
channel.description: Recent content on Hongwei Li(李洪伟)

item.title: Hongwei Li
item.description: About Me Hongwei Li is a Ph.D. student at the University of California, Santa Barbara, working under the supervision of Dr. Wenbo Guo. He is a member of Shellphish, a renowned cybersecurity research group, and a core member of the ARTIPHISHELL team that competed in the DARPA AI Cyber Challenge (AIxCC).
